title: [kimi-review] 7f46d18: [SEVERITY: high] **Thread blocked in I/O never sees the flag
description:
Commit: 7f46d1898
Message: fix(kiss): stop RX thread in deinit with shutdown flag

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] **Thread blocked in I/O never sees the flag** — If the RX thread blocks in `read()`/`recv()` on the serial port/socket, setting a flag won't wake it. Deinit will hang on `join()` or the thread outlives deinit. Typically requires closing the fd, a self-pipe/`eventfd`, or a `select()`/`poll()` timeout.
